name: Kozue's Strange Journey 2
short_description: One year after taking down the supernatural threat behind a series of disappearances, Sayuri Shirasagi and her friends team up once more to unravel a new mystery!
detailed_description:
There was a time when Sayuri Shirasagi barely got out of bed. Why bother, when she could game all night and sleep all day? But now she's made friends who want to hang out outside--and her sister won't let her laze around all day.

But getting out of bed has its perils. Sayuri and friends soon find themselves drawn into a new paranormal incident and faced with labyrinths full of the otherworldly creatures known as Shadows... Everywhere there are echoes of the trials they faced a year ago, but for some reason none of them can remember exactly what happened back then! Their only path to solving this terrifying mystery is to push forward through the danger.

Or Sayuri could simply go about her normal life, interacting with the city folk and taking each day as it comes. The choice is yours in Sayuri's new journey!

Explore labyrinths filled with treasure and danger alike. Climb, lockpick, jump, navigate hidden passages, and negotiate with monsters for new items. Fight strategic turn-based battles to seize victory!

Outside the labyrinth, nurture social stats like Courage and Kindness to develop relationships with people around town. It's not just a chance to make new friends: your relationships can open up lucrative new jobs and boost your abilities in combat!

Unlimited Social System

Form relationships with almost any character in the game! There are dozens of NPCs who you can get to know better the more you converse!

Dynamic Battles

Hit the enemy's weakness to knock them down and gain another turn! Keep the chain going until every enemy is down and you can unleash a devastating all-out attack!

Solve the Mystery

Something isn't right in the world. Depending on the choices you make, the world may remain forever distorted. What sacrifices will repairing it entail?
